response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014–2015) plus an academic project, falling far short of the 5–10 years required. Career focus has been web/backend in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no Windows-platform C++ work, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking. The mandatory and domain requirements are largely unmet.
strengths: Strong overall software engineering experience (10+ years) with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer tooling product
Fluent English communicator with demonstrated teaching/workshop background
concerns: Lacks the required 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows; recent stack is JS/TS/DLang
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; databases used are MongoDB and MySQL
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No fixed income or capital markets domain background
